title: /nodebug
text: /nodebug Instruct Uniface to compile the application shell, component, or global ProcScript so that it cannot be debugged. /nodebug Used With /all /aps or /app /dsp /esv /frm /rpt /ssv /svc /usp /lib Description Use the /nodebug subswitch to compile application shells, components, and global ProcScripts when they are ready for production and deployment. Note: The DebugPort and EnableDevTools properties are ignored or disabled in case a component is compiled with /nodebug . Related Links $NO_DEBUG Determine whether to compile components, application shells, and global ProcScripts that can be debugged, Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
